serviceAreas.description: NutritionColours is a remote clinical practice. No physical clinic branches exist outside Mumbai. All other locations are remote service areas.

disclaimer: NutritionColours provides nutritional guidance, not medical treatment. All content is educational. Consult a licensed clinician for medical decisions.
